title:
Market Rent Data - Tenancy Services
	 - data.govt.nz
content:
## Market Rent Data - Tenancy Services
Id like to request the data that populates this dashboard:
https://www.tenancy.govt.nz/rent-bond-and-bills/market-rent/

Would like the data per Auckland suburb and in format on website so data can be used as a tool for market rents
Processing times and generate accurate market rent data for our portfolio, very time consuming searching every Auckland suburb on the website
Releasing it into a excel document that is easily filtered and increase efficiency

#### Likely Source Agency
Ministry of Business Innovation and Employment
